svg.title: CryoDAQ before Montana — exhaustive repository map
svg.desc: Every intended repository file appears exactly once. Lines are Python imports. Larger dots indicate higher internal dependency degree; warm borders indicate Montana churn.

g.text: Node: full path · L=lines · D=import degree · Δ=changed lines from master
Load hotspot: larger right dot. Montana change hotspot: amber/red border. Every path is searchable and has a tooltip.
